title: Garry Kasparov's Spectacular Scotch Game (multi-game Short)
notes: SammyChess's signature style: a punchy, fast-paced Short covering several Kasparov Scotch games in quick succession (lead opponent: Jan Timman). Energetic, superlative-driven, pattern-focused delivery — a deliberate contrast to Agadmator's calm long-form storytelling. No single game.pgn here because the video is a multi-game compilation; the value is the VOICE. Auto-caption transcript (some words garbled by speech recognition).
